title: Vivy -Fluorite Eye's Song-
sourceNotes: 13-episode original anime (Wit Studio, story by Tappei Nagatsuki, 2021) paired with a concurrent 23-chapter (4-volume, complete) tie-in manga by Morito Yamataka that adapts the same story; the anime is a continuous narrative without distinct named arcs, so chapter ranges are proportioned across the story's two halves, split at the Ophelia/Antonio reveal in episode 8.

mappings.arc: First Singularity Points: Elysium to the Zodiac Signs Fes
